w:r.w:t: Using the uploaded image of the baby, generate a hyper-realistic portrait of the baby during an Indian wedding ceremony. Baby wears a tiny silk

with gold embroidery and a matching turban. Surround the baby with decorative flowers, miniature wedding props, and soft candlelight. Capture gentle light reflections on silk fabric and baby’s skin with a 50mm lens, f/1.4 aperture for creamy
. Include subtle motion blur for background family members performing rituals, maintaining baby in crisp focus.
are rich golds, reds, and ivory tones with soft highlights. Baby’s original expressions and features remain completely preserved. The portrait conveys celebration, joy, and traditional elegance.
Using the uploaded image of the baby, generate a hyper-realistic portrait during a family birthday celebration at home. Baby is seated on a decorative soft mat wearing a pastel-
outfit with tiny embroidered stars. Surround the baby with balloons, a small birthday cake, and

confetti. Capture soft ambient light from windows and ceiling lights using an 85mm lens, f/1.8 aperture for shallow depth of field. Ensure sharp focus on baby’s eyes and facial expressions. Include realistic textures of fabric, cake, and balloons.
should be pastel blues, pinks, yellows, and creams. Family members are visible
focus in the background, creating a warm, intimate atmosphere. Baby’s natural features remain unchanged.
Using the uploaded image of the baby, generate a hyper-realistic portrait with the baby wearing a tiny
-style embroidered jacket and dhoti, seated on a

hand-painted wooden floor mat. Surround the baby with small pots, miniature camels, and marigold strings. Capture warm late afternoon sunlight with soft shadows using a 50mm lens, f/1.8 aperture. Ensure ultra-sharp detail in embroidery, props, and baby’s hair.
includes bright reds, yellows, and blues with earthy tones. Baby’s natural expressions remain completely unchanged, creating a vibrant, culturally rich portrait.

Using the uploaded image of the baby, generate a hyper-realistic portrait of the baby in a tropical garden with exotic flowers like orchids and hibiscus. Baby sits on a soft pastel blanket with small decorative props: mini butterflies, small clay pots, and fresh petals. Sunlight filters through dense leaves, creating dappled lighting on baby’s face. Use
85mm lens with f/1.8 aperture for shallow depth of field, softening the dense greenery in the background. Include realistic texture of flowers, leaves, and baby’s clothing.

emphasize vibrant greens, purples, and pinks with soft highlights on skin. Include subtle breeze movement in leaves and petals. The baby’s original expressions and natural features are fully preserved, creating a dreamy, magical outdoor portrait.
